items.title: Build gate — both trees typecheck clean
items.expected: Both exit 0 with no errors introduced by this change.
items.evidence: Backend tsc exit 0; frontend tsc exit 0 (verified during execution).

items.title: PathGuard rejects traversal / separator names (unit test)
items.expected: All tests pass; names with .. / \ and empty names throw ProjectError (PROJECT_PATH_INVALID), out-of-root paths throw PROJECT_PATH_OUTSIDE_ROOT.

items.title: create-new-ts-project skill loads and asks via the JSON protocol
items.precondition: Skill at .claude/skills/create-new-ts-project/SKILL.md; a session running against any project
steps: 1. Confirm the skill appears in the Agent Manager list.
2. In a scratch session, invoke the skill.
items.expected: Skill is listed; first turn emits exactly one fenced ```deveasy-question block (the name confirmation), then waits. No AskUserQuestion tool use, no command-gate refusal.
items.notes: Behavioral — run against the live app.

items.title: POST /api/projects creates dir + git init and returns { project, sessionId }
items.precondition: App running (npm run dev:all), Postgres up, migrations applied
steps: 3. Repeat the same curl a second time
items.expected: 1st call: 201 with { success:true, data:{ project:{id,name,path,...}, sessionId:<n> } }; projects/smoke-test/ exists with a .git directory and injected CLAUDE.md/.claude symlinks. 2nd call: 409 with error.code PROJECT_EXISTS.

items.title: Wizard renders choices as buttons and round-trips the selection
steps: 3. Wait for the first question to render as buttons (the technical seed turn must NOT be visible).
4. Click an option (e.g. the Microsoft-auth answer).
items.expected: The deveasy-question renders as clickable options (raw JSON hidden); clicking sends the answer and the conversation advances to the next question or scaffolding.
items.notes: Behavioral — run against the live app.

items.title: Scaffold output is correct (Vision stack, optional MSAL, git init, no install, no secrets)
items.precondition: Completed wizard run with Microsoft auth = yes
items.expected: Backend (Express+Knex+TS) + frontend (React+Vite+TS+shadcn) packages present; MSAL scaffolding uses only AZURE_*/VITE_AZURE_* env placeholders (no real secrets); a .git exists; node_modules NOT installed; README documents the install/run next steps.
items.notes: Behavioral — run against the live app.

items.title: New project appears in the Projects list after completion
steps: 1. On deveasy-done / close, observe the Projects list.
items.expected: The new project appears in the list (the projects query was invalidated and re-scanned the git repo).
items.notes: Behavioral — run against the live app.

items.title: Subscription auth preserved — no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY introduced
steps: 1. grep the diff for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / new auth paths.
items.expected: No API key is set or required; the wizard reuses the existing CLI pipeline that scrubs the key. No Agent SDK dependency added.
items.evidence: No ANTHROPIC_API_KEY references added; no new dependencies; wizard reuses ClaudeProcessService + /ws/sessions unchanged.
